title: mentha × gothica
intro: Mentha × gothica, also known as Bowles' mint or Gothic mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint family, derived from the cross between Mentha requienii and Mentha × villosa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × gothica include relief from nausea, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
